question: Which of the following best describes the pattern of electricity demand in Region R during 2023?

options.A: Demand was generally higher in the first half of the year than in the second half.
options.B: Demand was generally lower in the first half of the year than in the second half.
options.C: Demand increased steadily from January to December.
options.D: Demand remained roughly constant throughout the year.

explanation: The inverted Y-axis makes it appear that the series is flipped vertically, which can swap the perceived highs and lows. The correct option matches the actual data values.
